data.requirement: Drop time-of-day categorization. Keep Hours as numerical for distribution analysis. Maintain original Days values for precise scheduling patterns
data.reason: Original Hours values (e.g. '3','9') lack AM/PM context, making time slot categorization unreliable. Days categorization loses granularity for courses meeting on non-grouped days like MWF.

data.requirement: Focus calculation on % of enrolled students majoring in the department (exclude minors due to sparse Minor_in data)
data.reason: Minor_in contains only 10 records vs 210 enrollments - statistically insignificant for analysis. Simplifies complex multi-table joins while maintaining relevance.

visualization.requirement: Faceted bar charts by Division (AS/EN) showing top 10 departments by enrollment with DName labels
visualization.reason: Full department list (26 unique DNames) creates overplotting. Faceting by Division reduces cognitive load while maintaining comparative analysis capability.

visualization.requirement: Add grade point mapping: Create joined view of Enrolled_in ↔ Gradeconversion for grade-aware analysis
visualization.reason: Original requirements lacked explicit grade data integration, required for meaningful performance-enrollment correlations

interaction.requirement: Replace department bar drill-down with search/filter widget for department selection
interaction.reason: 26 narrow bars would make target selection difficult. Text-based search improves accessibility for departmental focus.
